CE1.justification: Acted directly on the cold-pickup prompt, surfacing the urgent item and ranking the others without asking the user to recall or supply anything.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact and structured, but the closing offer block (a/b/c options plus 'Say the word and I'll proceed') adds a stretch of unneeded prose beyond what the question demanded.

CE3.justification: Explained inline why it skipped the daybook and went to followups.md ('no recent daybook to anchor on'), giving the user a cheap point to redirect.

CE4.justification: No workspace files were modified — the agent answered the question and proposed next steps, leaving no orphans or in-progress artifacts.
